---
title: "do_stats"
output: html_document
date: "2025-06-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## do stats, mixed effect analysis on the gradient metrics

```{r}
library(afex)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(readxl)
work_dir <- "/Users/apurplespoon/Desktop/UCAS/YanLab/Suzhou_Rumination/Revise/GradMetrix"
df <- read_excel(paste(work_dir, "/RumSuzhou.xlsx", sep = ""))
df$sub_idx <- factor(df$sub_idx)
df$group <- factor(df$group)
df$condition <- factor(df$condition)
df$head_motion <- as.numeric(df$head_motion)
```

## do mixed effect analysis, using ancova

```{}
```

## try using LME

```{r}
df$group <- relevel(df$group, ref = "2") 
df$condition <- relevel(df$condition, ref = "2") 
model <- lmer(G2_ExR ~ group * condition + head_motion + (1|sub_idx), data = df)
library(lme4)

# 拟合完整模型（包含所有主效应和交互项）
full_model <- lmer(G2_ExR ~ group * condition + head_motion + (1 | sub_idx), 
                   data = df, REML = FALSE)

# 计算 RSS 的函数
rss <- function(model) sum(residuals(model)^2)

# 1️⃣ 计算 group 的 Cohen's f²
model_no_group <- lmer(G2_ExR ~ condition + head_motion + (1 | sub_idx), 
                       data = df, REML = FALSE)
rss_full <- rss(full_model)
rss_group <- rss(model_no_group)
r2_group <- (rss_group - rss_full) / rss_group
f2_group <- r2_group / (1 - r2_group)

# 2️⃣ 计算 condition 的 Cohen's f²
model_no_condition <- lmer(G2_ExR ~ group + head_motion + (1 | sub_idx), 
                           data = df, REML = FALSE)
rss_condition <- rss(model_no_condition)
r2_condition <- (rss_condition - rss_full) / rss_condition
f2_condition <- r2_condition / (1 - r2_condition)

# 3️⃣ 计算交互项 group:condition 的 Cohen's f²
model_no_interaction <- lmer(G2_ExR ~ group + condition + head_motion + (1 | sub_idx), 
                             data = df, REML = FALSE)
rss_interaction <- rss(model_no_interaction)
r2_interaction <- (rss_interaction - rss_full) / rss_interaction
f2_interaction <- r2_interaction / (1 - r2_interaction)

# ✅ 打印所有结果
cat("✅ Cohen's f²:\n")
cat(" - group:             ", round(f2_group, 4), "\n")
cat(" - condition:         ", round(f2_condition, 4), "\n")
cat(" - group*condition:   ", round(f2_interaction, 4), "\n")

summary(model)
```
